name: Graphiti Knowledge Graph
description: Temporal knowledge graph for persistent agent memory. Auto-recalls relevant facts before each conversation and captures knowledge after.

autoRecall.description: Inject relevant facts before each conversation turn

autoCapture.description: Automatically ingest conversation content into the graph

recallMaxFacts.description: Max facts to inject on auto-recall

minPromptLength.description: Minimum prompt length to trigger auto-recall

apiKey.description: Optional API key sent as Bearer token (for reverse proxy auth)

autoIndex.description: Create index episodes when files are written to memory/

autoIndexExtensions.description: File extensions to index when autoIndex is enabled (include leading dot, e.g. ".md")

url.label: Graphiti Server URL
url.help: URL of the Graphiti FastAPI server (default: http://localhost:8100)

groupId.label: Group ID
groupId.help: Graph namespace for this agent (default: core)

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant facts before each conversation (default: off)

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically ingest conversation content into the graph (default: on)

recallMaxFacts.label: Max Recall Facts
recallMaxFacts.help: Maximum number of facts to inject on auto-recall (default: 10)

minPromptLength.label: Min Prompt Length
minPromptLength.help: Minimum prompt length to trigger auto-recall (default: 10)

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional Bearer token for Graphiti server auth (reverse proxy scenarios)

autoIndex.label: Auto-Index Memory
autoIndex.help: Create index episodes in Graphiti when files are written to memory/ (default: on)

autoIndexExtensions.label: Index File Extensions
autoIndexExtensions.help: Only index memory files with these extensions (default: .md, .txt)

debug.label: Debug Log
debug.help: Write structured debug log for diagnostics — no conversation content logged (default: on)

logFile.label: Debug Log Path
logFile.help: Custom path for the debug log file
